ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status, "Accepted"), Opportunity.Has_Accepted_Quote__c, OR( ISNEW(), AND( ISCHANGED(Status), NOT( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), "Accepted") ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only one Accepted Quote can exist for an Enquiry, please mark the other Quote as Rejected if you want to continue with this Enquiry.
